creator: shun.fbsd.pr@dropcut.net
text:
Created attachment 154882
adding CPE information to Makefile

databases/couchdb has had vulnerabilities with a CPE identifier assigned (e.g. CVE-2014-2668). This patch adds CPE information as suggested in the FreeBSD wiki[0].

[0] https://wiki.freebsd.org/Ports/CPE
